summary: This document outlines the Digital Technology Assessment Criteria (DTAC) used by the NHS to evaluate health and social care technologies. It details five core components including clinical safety (DCB0129/0160), data protection, technical security, and interoperability standards required for product assessment. The text serves as a framework for demonstrating compliance with NHS Service Standards and ensuring patient safety and data security.
